titleStmt.title: SII 10.332: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 332. (A.R. No. 283 of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURTYARD OF THE MŪLABRAHMĒŚVARA TEMPLE AT THE FOOT OF THE TRIPURĀNTAKAM HILL, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1172 (Sādhāraṇa)

summary.p: States that Gaṇḍapeṇḍāru Gaṅgaya-Sāhiṇi gave away all the lands in the villages of Bōyalapalli and Reḍlapalli with all sources of income to god Mūlasthānadēva of Tripurāntakamu, for the merit of Gaṇapatīdēva-Mahārāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara bāhattari niyō
gādhipati Anēka dēśādhipati cāturvvarṇnasamuddhara
paścimarāyadāmōdara saisyadiśāpaṭṭa Ēkāṁga
vīra vīrāvatāra Ativiṣamahayārūḍha prauḍharē
khārēvaṁtta vijayalakṣmīkāṁta nāyakanārāya
ṇa kadanapracaṁḍa manniyabēṁṭakāra gaṇapatidēva
divyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka dōstaṁbhastaṁbhitasakalakṣi
tipālaśauryya yaśastōmatilaka taṭi ṁganāmu
kha vitaraṇaguṇavinirjitakāmadhēnu kalpadruma
ḍiya ya diśāpaṭṭa mūrurāya jagadaḷa barabala
nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara gaṁḍapeṁḍāru gaṁgayasāhiṇi svasti śrī
śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1175 (?) Agu nēṁṭi sādhāraṇasaṁva
tsara puṣya śu 5 gu . nāṁṭimakarasaṁkrāṁttipuṇya
kālamaṁdu śrītripurāṁtakamu śrīmūlasthāna
dēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku gaṇapatidēvamahārāju
laku tamaku dharmmuvugānu duvalikaṁpanamu
bōyalapallinireḍlapallipolamūnu catussīma
mūnu sakalāyasahitamugā dhārāpūrvakaṁ
sēsi Iccenu . sāmā nyōyaṁ dharmasētuṁ nṛpānāṁ
imprecatory verses
niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . Idharmmuvunaku Evarēni
laṁghanamu talaṁcinavāru gaṁgātīramaṁdu tanapedda
koḍuku kapālamu paṭṭukoni śatrugrihamunaku
bhikṣānakuṁ bōyi tēnu cīṁpuṟukaṭṭanāṭuvaḍi
padivēla kapilagōvula vadhiIṁcina mahāpā
takānaṁ baḍaṁgalavāru . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrī
Note:—The year Sādhāraṇa corresponds to the Śaka year 1172 and not to 1175.
Digital edition of SII 10.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
